name: Delicious Black-Eyed Pea and Cornbread Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 packages cornbread mix, baked per package instructions,
8 slices bacon, cooked crisp and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble cornbread into a large bowl.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the bowl and mix well.
3. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Marvelous and easy.
